prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年中南大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约13882名、16868名、18997名、21199名、17358名。2021至2024年呈持续后移趋势（累计后移约7300名），2025年出现明显反弹，位次前移约3841名，回升至17358名，显示报考热度有所恢复。近两年波动幅度较大，2024年位次为近五年最低点；中南大学在山东省综合类招生计划数：2021年300人、2022年304人、2023年307人、2024年309人、2025年323人，逐年小幅扩招。2026年计划为329人，较2025年增加6人（+1.86%），扩招幅度较小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中南大学是985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校。软科中国大学排名：2021年第23名、2022年第23名、2023年第23名、2024年第25名、2025年第27名、2026年第27名，近年排名略有下滑但整体稳定在25名左右，属于国内顶尖高校梯队；2026年高考周期内中南大学声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及原校长张尧学涉嫌严重违纪违法被查事件，可能对学校学术声誉产生一定影响。抖音热度排名第85位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光度不高。2024年声誉评价亦为偏负面，涉及录取断档现象。2025年声誉评价同样偏负面，涉及重庆某专业录取分数线异常。整体来看，近年声誉信号偏负面，但未出现明显断档或大规模负面舆情；第五轮学科评估中，中南大学A-及以上学科共13个：冶金工程A+、护理学A+、材料科学与工程A、计算机科学与技术A-、临床医学A-、交通运输工程A-、土木工程A-、机械工程A-、控制科学与工程A-、化学工程与技术A-、基础医学A-、管理科学与工程A-、马克思主义理论A-。其中冶金工程和护理学为A+，材料科学与工程为A，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据中，计算机类（高热推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、临床医学（推荐）、口腔医学（推荐）等与中南大学优势学科高度契合的专业持续高热；土木建筑（分化观望）热度偏低。山东省考生总数：2021年54.4万、2022年59.5万、2023年66.2万、2024年66.6万、2025年68.1万、2026年72.0万（普通高考），考生规模持续增长，2026年较2025年增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），竞争加剧。省控线（普通类一段）2021–2025年分别为444、437、443、444、441分，整体平稳；中南大学位于湖南省长沙市，非山东省本地高校。根据地域招生汇总，中南大学在山东省的招生人数占其全国总招生比例约5%-6%，属于跨省招生中占比中等的省份。山东省考生对省外优质985高校的报考意愿较强，无明显地域偏好偏差。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅反弹至17358名的回暖趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招1.86%、山东省考生总数增长约5.7%导致竞争加剧、学校声誉偏负面但未出现重大报考危机、优势学科与热门专业高度契合等因素，预计2026年中南大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次将较2025年基本持平并略有前移。考生规模增长带来的竞争压力与扩招效应相互抵消，声誉偏负面产生轻微下拉作用，但优势学科吸引力支撑位次稳定。预测最低位次约17352名，区间16852–17852名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约17352名，区间16852–17852名。位次在区间下限（16852名）以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（临床医学八年制、口腔医学5+3、计算机拔尖班）；位次在区间中部（17352名附近）建议以二档专业为主（临床医学类、电子信息类、自动化类、数学类），兼顾一档边缘专业；位次在区间上限（17852名）附近建议以三档专业保底（机械类、能源动力类、材料类），同时可尝试二档中位次要求较低的专业。中南大学优势学科集中在医学、材料、冶金、计算机等领域，建议结合个人兴趣与学科评估等级综合选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Central South University in Shandong Province comprehensive category were approximately 13882, 16868, 18997, 21199, and 17358 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous backward trend (cumulative backward shift of about 7300 places), but in 2025, there was a significant rebound, with the ranking moving forward by about 3841 places to 17358, indicating a recovery in application popularity. The fluctuation range has been large in the past two years, with the 2024 ranking being the lowest in five years. The enrollment plan for Central South University in Shandong Province comprehensive category: 300 in 2021, 304 in 2022, 307 in 2023, 309 in 2024, and 323 in 2025, with a slight expansion each year. The 2026 plan is 329, an increase of 6 (+1.86%) compared to 2025, a small expansion that has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central South University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Soft Science Chinese University Rankings: 23rd in 2021, 23rd in 2022, 23rd in 2023, 25th in 2024, 27th in 2025, and 27th in 2026. The ranking has slightly declined in recent years but remains stable around 25th, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation of Central South University is slightly negative, mainly involving the former president Zhang Yaoxue being investigated for serious violations of discipline and law, which may have a certain impact on the academic reputation of the school. Douyin popularity ranking is 85th, rated as "average", with low exposure on short video platforms. The 2024 reputation evaluation was also slightly negative, involving a phenomenon of admission cutoff drops. The 2025 reputation evaluation was also slightly negative, involving abnormal admission scores for a certain major in Chongqing. Overall, the reputation signals in recent years have been slightly negative, but there has been no obvious cutoff drop or large-scale negative public opinion. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Central South University has 13 disciplines rated A- or above: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Clinical Medicine A-, Transportation Engineering A-, Civil Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Basic Medicine A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, and Marxist Theory A-. Among them, Metallurgical Engineering and Nursing are A+, and Materials Science and Engineering is A, with strong disciplinary strength, which has a strong attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In the 2026 major popularity data, computer science (highly recommended), electronic information/communication (highly recommended), electrical engineering and automation (highly recommended), clinical medicine (recommended), and stomatology (recommended) are highly popular and closely aligned with Central South University's advantageous disciplines. Civil engineering and architecture (differentiated and wait-and-see) have low popularity. Total number of candidates in Shandong Province: 544,000 in 2021, 595,000 in 2022, 662,000 in 2023, 666,000 in 2024, 681,000 in 2025, and 720,000 in 2026 (regular college entrance examination). The number of candidates continues to grow, with an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) in 2026 compared to 2025, intensifying competition. The provincial control line (regular first batch) from 2021 to 2025 is 444, 437, 443, 444, and 441 points respectively, generally stable. Central South University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, not a local university in Shandong. According to regional enrollment summary, the proportion of Central South University's enrollment in Shandong Province to its total national enrollment is about 5%-6%, which is a medium proportion among cross-provincial enrollments. Candidates in Shandong Province have a strong willingness to apply for high-quality 985 universities outside the province, with no obvious regional preference bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound of the 2025 ranking to 17358, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by 1.86%, the increase in the number of candidates in Shandong Province by about 5.7% leading to intensified competition, the slightly negative school reputation but no major application crisis, and the high alignment between advantageous disciplines and popular majors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Central South University in Shandong Province comprehensive category in 2026 will be roughly the same as in 2025 with a slight forward shift. The competitive pressure from the growth in candidate numbers and the expansion effect offset each other, the slightly negative reputation has a slight downward pull, but the attraction of advantageous disciplines supports the stability of the ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is about 17352, with a range of 16852 to 17852.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 17352, range 16852–17852. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (16852) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Stomatology 5+3, Computer Top Talent Base Class); candidates with rankings around the middle of the range (17352) are advised to mainly choose Tier 2 majors (Clinical Medicine, Electronic Information, Automation, Mathematics), while also considering borderline Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (17852) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net (Mechanical Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering), while also trying Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. Central South University's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in medicine, materials, metallurgy, and computer science. It is recommended to combine personal interests with discipline evaluation grades for a comprehensive selection.
